lever_summary: Dense f64 2D convolution. eval_conv_2d's non-complex innermost loop read lhs.elements[idx].as_f64() + rhs.elements[idx].as_f64() per multiply (Literal materialization + match). New dense f64 fast path reads both operands from as_f64_slice() and accumulates in f64, emitting new_f64_values — bypassing the per-multiply Literal dispatch in the convolution hot loop.

alien_graveyard.primitive: dense SoA + direct convolution over contiguous typed storage
alien_graveyard.mapping: evaluate the conv stencil over contiguous native f64 with a typed multiply-accumulate instead of materializing + matching a tagged-union per multiply

method: Same-worker comparison on vmi1156319: dense (new_f64_values) lhs+rhs vs Vec<Literal>-backed lhs+rhs run in the same process; identical SAME-padding stride-1 conv params.
command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- conv2d_32x32x8 --save-baseline cv

change.lever: eval_conv_2d gains a dense f64 fast path (both operands as_f64_slice, f64 multiply-accumulate, new_f64_values output) before the generic non-complex loop, gated on out_dtype==F64 and both operands dense; complex / non-dense / mixed inputs fall through unchanged.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: same n/oh/ow/co output iteration and same kh/kw/ci accumulation order with the same padding bounds skip; same lhs_idx/rhs_idx index math
isomorphism.arithmetic: unchanged: acc starts at 0.0 and accumulates lhs*rhs in the same order; for dense f64, src[idx] == as_f64().unwrap_or(0.0); output via from_f64 (out_dtype == F64, new_f64_values)
isomorphism.errors: same checked_mul batch-offset overflow check; gated on as_f64_slice() Some so complex / non-dense / mixed-dtype inputs use the generic path

validation.name: dense_conv2d_parity
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib --release conv
validation.result: passed: 22 tests incl dense_f64_conv_2d_matches_generic (valid/same x stride 1/2, multi-channel [2,9,7,3] x [3,3,3,4]; dense vs Literal/generic by bits)

validation.name: clippy_deny_warnings
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --release --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
validation.result: passed (release dodges shared-target proc-macro rmeta drift in debug)
